---
title: "T24 — Domain Wall Dynamics"
subtitle: "Emergent fermions and surface states"
---

## Objective

Simulate domain walls between +σ_e and -σ_e regions and test the conjecture that they host all-fermion toric code surface states.

## Status

🔴 **Blocked on T20 + T21**

## Theory

Domain wall tension:

$$
\sigma_{DW} \propto (K - K_c)^{\mu}
$$

Conjecture: Wall excitations have fermionic self-statistics.

## Tasks

- [ ] Create planar domain wall in T20 configurations
- [ ] Measure surface tension
- [ ] Test anyonic braiding statistics
- [ ] Verify fermionic exchange phases

## References

- Paper: Section 5.3
